'''âth-h-w-r''' ('''kathahweroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbraid|imbraid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-h-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbraid|imbraid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-h-w-r
|-
! Lemma
| kathahweroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithahweroko|thithahweroko]] || [[word:jithahweroko|jithahweroko]] || [[word:shithahweroko|shithahweroko]] || [[word:kithahweroko|kithahweroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothahweroko|thothahweroko]] || [[word:jothahweroko|jothahweroko]] || [[word:shothahweroko|shothahweroko]] || [[word:kothahweroko|kothahweroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthahweroko|thĂŠthahweroko]] || [[word:jĂŠthahweroko|jĂŠthahweroko]] || [[word:shĂŠthahweroko|shĂŠthahweroko]] || [[word:kĂŠthahweroko|kĂŠthahweroko]]

|-
